title: Relics: Alex's Caves Compat
description: Compatibility addon between Relics and Alex's Caves
body:
Relics: Alex's Caves Compat (RAC-Compat) is an addon designed to seamlessly integrate with two popular Minecraft mods: Relics and Alex's Caves. Relics is a mod that introduces a variety of unique and powerful artifacts into the game, each with its own special abilities and lore. Alex's Caves, on the other hand, introduces rare and meticulously designed caves into your Minecraft universe. RAC-Compat bridges these two mods by introducing new relics that are specifically tailored to the mechanics introduced in Alex's Caves. This integration not only expands the variety of relics available, but also ensures that they are thematically and functionally consistent with the features of Alex's Caves, thereby enhancing the overall gameplay experience for users of both mods.

This mod requires Relics and Alex's Caves!
